title: Numeric Ping
description: Shows players' ping ranges as numbers... As a resource pack!
body: # | DESCRIPTION | Replaces the connection icon in the tab list with general numbers. There are mods that do this feature and are very precise, but since they are mods, they may be inaccessible to vanilla players. Ping ranges: 0 - 5 bars, 100 - 4 bars, 300 - 3 bars, 600 - 2 bars, 1000 - 1 bar. Measured in milliseconds. If you need to be specific, for example in PvP, try using mods. # | VERSIONS | Currently supports Minecraft Java ```1.20.2-26.1```. # | COMPATIBILITY | Incompatible with mods that modify or replace the ping icons in the tab list, such as other mods that replace it with text or numbers. ## | Patreon | Join my new Patreon to support my projects!
